title.tagline: Pick your class. Survive the gauntlet.
title.help1: Win streaks multiply coin rewards — saved to your wallet.
title.help2: Death keeps all coins in your wallet.
title.help3: Retreat forfeits coins earned this run only.
select.heading: — CHOOSE YOUR CLASS —
select.mkUnlock: Unlock: reach Floor {floor} with Tabby Knight and Whisker Mage.
select.classUnlock: Reach floor {floor} on any class to unlock {name}.
shop.skillUpgrades: Skill upgrades (Lv 10, Cooldown cut at 5 and 10)
combo.mageKnight.name: Spellclaw Knight
combo.mageKnight.desc: Warrior and Mage arts united. Prestige camp costs 3×.
combo.sage.name: Sage of the Meow
combo.templar.name: Sunclaw Templar
combo.duelist.name: Bladeclaw Duelist
combo.arcanist.name: Trickclaw Arcanist
combo.plaguecat.name: Plagueclaw
spell.toxicPrayer.name: Toxic Prayer
spell.toxicPrayer.desc: Poison: 33.34% max HP per turn, 3 turns (refresh only).
spell.aegisMirror.name: Aegis Mirror
spell.aegisMirror.desc: Next hit: heal 10% damage taken, reflect 50% to foe.
spell.nosferatu.name: Nosferatu
spell.nosferatu.desc: ~1× ATK damage; heal 33–50% of damage dealt same turn.
battle.aegisReflect: 🪞 Aegis reflects {reflect} to {name}! You heal {heal} HP.
battle.defendLog: 🛡️ You brace for the next hit!
gameover.title: GAME OVER
gameover.help: All coins stay in your wallet — nothing is lost on death. Spend at camp, then try again.
spell.fire.name: Fire
spell.fire.desc: ~1× ATK. Afterburn lingers on more foes as Fire levels up. Melts freeze.
spell.blizzard.name: Blizzard
spell.blizzard.desc: Weaker hit. Freezes 1–3 turns. Fire melts ice.
spell.thunder.name: Thunder
spell.mend.name: Mend
spell.mend.desc: Restore HP — only solo heal among base classes.
